 {"id":"franken_numpy-u089","title":"numpy.tri python wrapper parity","description":"Add fnp_python.tri passthrough wrapper around numpy.tri(N, M=None, k=0, dtype=float). Returns an array with ones at and below the k-th diagonal and zeros elsewhere. Include oracle test covering: tri(3) default, tri(3, 4) rectangular, k=1 above diagonal, k=-1 below diagonal, dtype=int, and verifying lower-triangular structure.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T10:11:16.817062980Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T10:11:16.817062980Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"franken_numpy-u1zf","title":"Investigate Beads integrity_check warnings on freshly rebuilt DBs","description":"`br doctor --json` reports `sqlite.integrity_check` warnings (`page ... is never used`) on the canonical `.beads/beads.db` and also on a freshly rebuilt temp DB imported from healthy JSONL. `br show`, `br sync --status`, and rollback-only write probes all succeed, so this may be a frankensqlite/br diagnostic issue rather than repo-local corruption. Reproduce in isolation and determine whether repair, vacuum/checkpoint, or upstream fix is required.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-31T03:03:44.813529433Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-31T03:06:45.143864391Z","closed_at":"2026-03-31T03:06:45.143561397Z","close_reason":"Rebuilt .gitignore so .beads inner ignore rules work   [● P1 · CLOSED]
Owner: ubuntu · Type: bug
Created: 2026-03-31 · Updated: 2026-03-31
Closed: 2026-03-31 (Removed the blanket root .beads/ ignore, preserved specific local-only Beads artifact ignores, and verified br doctor
OK jsonl.merge_artifacts
OK gitignore.beads_inner
OK sync_jsonl_path: JSONL path is within sync allowlist
OK sync_conflict_markers: No merge conflict markers found
OK jsonl.parse: Parsed 195 records
OK db.recovery_artifacts
WARN db.sidecars: WAL sidecar exists without a matching SHM sidecar at /data/projects/franken_numpy/.beads/beads.db-wal (expected for frankensqlite)
OK schema.tables
OK schema.columns
OK db.recoverable_anomalies
OK db.null_defaults
WARN sqlite.integrity_check: database disk image is malformed: page 53 is never used
OK counts.db_vs_jsonl: Both have 195 records
OK sync.metadata: Database and JSONL are in sync
WARN db.write_probe: Failed to begin rollback-only write probe: database is busy
WARN sqlite3.integrity_check: sqlite3 not available; skipping orthogonal integrity validation now reports gitignore.beads_inner=ok.)

`br doctor` warns that root `.gitignore` excludes `.beads/`, which prevents `.beads/.gitignore` from governing Beads runtime artifacts. This conflicts with the repo workflow that stages `.beads/` state in git. Fix the root ignore rule so tracked Beads files are not globally suppressed while preserving ignores for local-only sidecars/history., and {

  "db_newer": false
} are now healthy on the default DB.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"franken_numpy-u5ry","title":"numpy.triu python wrapper parity","description":"Add fnp_python.triu passthrough wrapper around numpy.triu(m, k=0).
